form.formComment: Flew the lids with a slick early split last time and went on to clock 17.55 as a strongly fancied winner over 300m at this track. In winning form now and looks a major threat.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 300m. Last start finished 3rd over 300m at Casino beaten 8 lengths (17.30) behind Most Determined in a Grade 5 on April 2. Safe beginner and will give a great sight.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 300m. Last start finished 3rd over 300m at Casino beaten 8 lengths (17.30) behind Most Determined in a Grade 5 on April 2. Safe beginner and will give a great sight.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Went up with the lids at the start and as a result was slow to begin.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 4.5 lengths over 300m at this track in a handy (17.34), beating Tout Belle. Will find this a bit tougher, solid win last time out but this looks tough.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage fourth but before that won by 2.25 lengths at this track (17.54) beating Douglas in a Grade 5 on March 28. Shouldn't trouble the top few hopes.

form.formComment: In fine form with wins at her last couple of outings when well in the market at this track. Others favoured this time.

form.formComment: Won his last two including a strong win last start racing on the pace over 300m at this track by 3 lengths in a Grade 5. Top chance to chalk-up the hat-trick.

form.formComment: Solid performance to post a big 6 lengths win at this track over 300m (17.57) beating Miss Edie Jet in Grade 5 on March 28. Can't enthuse on this occasion.

form.formComment: Should get a clear run from the wide draw. Wasn't impressive last start but does have a great record at this track and distance, leading chance on best form.
